info.title: Profile Services API
info.description: Generated from framework-free Route descriptors (Elysia + Bun runtime).

get.summary: Liveness probe — always 200 once the process is booted
Readiness probe — every backend must answer within 2s

get.description: Returns service metrics in Prometheus exposition format.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the user account. Requires confirmation phrase: "DELETE MY ACCOUNT".

post.description: Registers a new user account and returns auth tokens for auto-login.

delete.description: Deactivates the authenticated user account (soft delete).

get.summary: Counts of admin-actionable queues: reports, verifications, stale shadow profiles

delete.summary: Remove a collaborator from a resume (admin)

get.summary: Get platform metrics for admin dashboard
List all feature flags with metadata and blocking info

patch.summary: Toggle a flag or update its role restriction
patch.description: Turning ON is rejected with 409 when any ancestor is OFF. Deprecated flags are read-only.

get.summary: Preview transitive descendants affected when a flag is turned OFF

post.description: Clears server-side caches and pushes an `invalidate` message through the SSE stream so every connected client refetches.

get.summary: List every FitQuestion in the pool

post.summary: Create a new ResumeStyle (validates ATS threshold)

get.summary: List all section types with pagination
Get a section type by key
List currently active access modifiers for a user

post.summary: Apply an access modifier (suspension or grant) to a user

get.description: Streams only ATS-score updates for a resume.
Streams view and ATS score updates for a resume in real time.
Streams only view-count updates for a resume.

get.summary: Get analytics for a share id
Get analytics events for a share id

post.summary: Approve a curated item — submits a JobApplication using the user's primary resume.

get.summary: This week's curated batch for the viewer.

delete.description: Disables 2FA and removes all backup codes.

post.description: Generates new backup codes, replacing existing ones. Shown only once.

post.summary: Setup two-factor authentication for the current user
post.description: Generates TOTP secret and QR code. 2FA is not enabled until verified.

get.description: Returns 2FA status including enabled state and backup codes remaining.

post.description: Verifies TOTP token and enables 2FA. Returns backup codes (shown only once).

get.description: Returns how many seconds the authenticated user must wait before requesting another verification email. The UI uses this so the countdown survives page reloads.

post.description: Sends a verification email to the authenticated user. No body required.
Verifies the user email using the token received via email.
Sends a password reset email if the account exists. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Authenticates user with email and password. Sets the session cookie. Returns `{userId}` or `{userId, twoFactorRequired}` when 2FA is enabled.
Completes login by validating a TOTP or backup code. Sets the session cookie.
Logs out the user by invalidating refresh token(s) and clearing the session cookie.

get.summary: Whether a given OAuth provider is configured.

get.description: Frontend renders a button per provider and uses `window.location.href = startUrl` to begin the flow.

post.description: Rolls the session cookie. Body `refreshToken` is optional and used only by non-browser clients.
Resets the user password using a valid reset token received via email.

get.description: Returns current user data if authenticated via session cookie or JWT bearer.

get.summary: List active sessions (devices) for the current user.

delete.summary: Revoke a specific session (device) by refresh-token id.

post.summary: Submit tailored applications to every open job that matches minFit. Bounded by maxApplications (default 20, cap 100).

get.summary: Public list of badges for a given user.

post.summary: Aggregate opt-in peers who share ≥60% of the requested stack into experienceYears buckets; returns current bucket + 3/5/10y projections.

get.summary: Check if a user is blocked
Get or create conversation with a user
Get all conversations for the current user

post.summary: Send a message to an existing conversation
Mute / unmute notifications for a conversation.
Pin / unpin a conversation for the current user.
Mark all messages in a conversation as read
Send a message to a user

get.summary: Search users to start a conversation

post.summary: Compile DSL to AST (preview, no persistence)

get.summary: Get compiled AST for a resume
Get compiled AST for a public resume
List all enum keys exposed by the catalog.
Full descriptor for a UI enum (notification-types, job-application-event-types, etc.) with localized labels + icon hints.

get.description: Returns all available export formats for resume export
Returns all available resume section types from definitions
Returns all available user roles in the system

post.summary: Ingest a batch of product events
post.description: Accepts up to 100 events per request. Events are stored as-is; props is free-form JSON. The expected event names + shapes are listed by `/v1/events/schemas`.

get.description: Returns `{events:[{name,version,propsSchema,requiredContext?,piiFields?}]}`. The frontend uses this to know which event names + prop shapes are valid before emitting.

get.summary: Generate resume JSON (returns signed download URL)
Generate resume LaTeX (returns signed download URL)
Generate resume DOCX (returns signed download URL)
Generate resume PDF (returns signed download URL)
Generate the authenticated user's resume as PDF (base64)
Active flags for the current user
get.description: Returns `{flags: Record<string, boolean>}`. A flag is `true` only if its own enabled state, every ancestor, and the role restriction all allow it. Frontend uses `flags[key]` directly without per-key resolution.
Same payload as /v1/feature-flags/active. Kept for transition.
Server-Sent Events channel emitting `invalidate` messages when admin toggles a flag or triggers a broadcast refresh. Clients should re-fetch /evaluate on each message.
Streams real-time feed updates for the authenticated user.
Streams real-time feed updates filtered by activity type.

post.summary: Commit the 25 Fit Answers; compute and persist vector

delete.summary: LGPD - wipe the caller's Fit Answers and anonymize the vector

get.summary: Get the caller's Fit Profile lifecycle state
Get or create the caller's 25-question set
Prisma enum label dictionary in the negotiated locale
get.description: Returns `{ locale, entries: { [EnumName]: { [VALUE]: label } } }`. Locale is chosen from `Accept-Language` (supports `en`, `pt-BR`).

get.summary: Error-message dictionary in the negotiated locale
get.description: Returns `{ locale, entries: { [CODE]: localized message } }`. Locale is chosen from `Accept-Language` (supports `en`, `pt-BR`).

get.summary: Notification-template dictionary in the negotiated locale
get.description: Returns `{ locale, entries: { [TYPE]: { title, body, params[] } } }`. Templates may contain `{ param }` placeholders — the client substitutes them at render time using the `params` list as the allowed key set.

post.summary: Parse a GitHub profile (repos + languages) into suggested resume content. Does not write to the resume — the client previews, the user accepts.

get.summary: Get GitHub profile summary for a username
get.description: GitHub summary with repositories, contributions, and stats

post.summary: Sync GitHub data to user resume

get.summary: Get GitHub sync status for a resume

post.summary: Auto-sync GitHub from resume GitHub link

get.summary: Fetch a single job by id
List applications received for a job (job owner only)

delete.summary: Withdraw the current user application to a job

post.summary: Submit a quick application to a job

get.summary: Apply-context: defaults + requirements + blockers for the apply modal
get.description: Returns `{defaults:{coverLetter,resumeId},requirements:[{type,key,label,required,options?}],cta,oneClickAvailable,blockers?:[{code,message,suggestedAction?}]}` so the frontend renders the apply modal entirely server-driven.

get.summary: Fit score breakdown for this job against the viewer's primary resume
get.description: Returns `{score, dimensions:[{key,label,value,target,color,hint,weight}], matchedKeywords?, missingKeywords?}` so the frontend renders bars/cards by iterating dimensions[] without per-key mapping.

get.summary: Get the recruiter-authored Fit Profile for a job

post.summary: Upsert the recruiter-authored Fit Profile for a job

get.summary: Jobs similar to the given one (by skill overlap)
List active applications submitted by the current user

post.summary: Record a timeline event on an application (viewed, interview scheduled, offer, etc.).
post.description: Timeline + silence detection for job applications

get.summary: Per-company response percentiles (p50/p90 days to first response).
get.description: Timeline + silence detection for job applications

get.summary: Full application timeline for the viewer (enviada → visualizada → entrevista → oferta/silêncio).
get.description: Timeline + silence detection for job applications

get.summary: List jobs bookmarked by the current user

post.summary: Fetch a careers page and return an LLM-extracted job preview (not persisted)

get.summary: List jobs the current user (recruiter) authored
List jobs recommended for the current user based on resume skills
Same as GET /jobs but each item is enriched with a 0-100 structured fit score for the current user.

post.summary: Compute the Match Score for a (resume, job) pair

get.summary: Read the Match Score for a (resume, job) pair (cached)

get.description: Exports all user data in machine-readable JSON format.

get.summary: Permission-aware navigation tree for the current user with labels in the request locale.

post.description: Changes the password for the authenticated user after verifying the current password.

put.summary: Set proficiency for a skill (creates if missing).

get.summary: Returns every UI-state row for the current user. UI bootstraps once and reads keys locally.
Get notification preferences for the current user

put.summary: Update a notification type preference (in-app enable + email channel + delivery mode).

get.description: Pushes new notifications as they are created for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Notification types with channels + user preferences
get.description: Returns `{types:[{key,label,description,category,channels:[{key,enabled,locked?}],userEnabled}]}`. The frontend renders the settings matrix directly from this payload — adding a new type is a backend-only change.

get.summary: Subscribe to live resume preview updates
get.description: Streams PNG preview as base64 when onboarding data changes.

get.summary: Get onboarding session with field definitions and navigation

post.summary: Complete onboarding — backend builds payload from saved progress
Save current step data and advance to next step
Restart onboarding with existing profile data
Save current step data without advancing

get.description: Returns `{widgets:[{id,type,title,size,data,actions?,cta?}]}`. Adding/removing widgets is a backend-only change. Today the server emits widgets for greeting, counters, recent notifications and follow-ups; the frontend simply iterates `widgets[]` and dispatches on `type`.
Returns `{section, fields:[...], actions:[...], info:[...]}`. The frontend renders settings pages from this payload — adding a setting field or action is a backend-only change.
Returns the server-driven composer config the frontend uses to render the post-creation UI: limits, allowed media types, poll/repost availability, mention cap, post types.

get.summary: Get a user's public profile by username
Get public resume by share slug
Download public resume by share slug
OpenGraph preview image for a public share slug
Server-driven config for the create/edit-job wizard
get.description: Returns `{steps:[{id,label,fields:[...]}], options:{...}}`. The frontend iterates `steps[]` and renders inputs from each `field`. Adding a step or field is a backend-only change.

post.summary: Rank up-to-N opt-in candidates for a job description using the same structured fit-score model used on the candidate side (reverse match).

get.summary: Render a generic preview PDF for the style
Get all resumes for current user

post.summary: Save analytics snapshot for tracking progress
Invite user to collaborate on resume

get.summary: List collaboration comments on a resume

post.summary: Add a comment / reply to a resume

get.summary: Structured diff between the master resume and a tailored version.
get.description: Summary / jobTitle / bullets before → after shape.

get.summary: Get a resume with all sections
Get the latest Resume Quality Score snapshot
List sections and items for a resume

post.summary: Create section item in a dynamic section type

delete.summary: Delete section item from a dynamic section type

patch.summary: Update section item in a dynamic section type

get.summary: List active dynamic section types with resolved translations
Get analytics for a shared resume (nested route)

post.summary: Add a skill to a resume
Apply a ResumeStyle to a resume
Rewrite this resume for a specific job using the AI pipeline.

get.summary: List tailored resume variants produced by the AI.
get.description: All tailored variants the user has generated so far.

get.summary: Lightweight SVG thumbnail of the resume (name + title + summary preview)

delete.summary: Delete a comment (author or resume owner)

post.summary: Mark a comment thread as resolved

get.description: Returns all import jobs for authenticated user, ordered by creation date

delete.description: Cancels pending or processing import. Cannot cancel completed imports.

get.description: Returns current status, errors, and result of import job

post.description: Retries processing of failed import job with same data
Uses the user's previously-connected GitHub OAuth token to fetch top repos and derive skills + BUILD posts. Fails with 409 GITHUB_NOT_CONNECTED if the user hasn't linked GitHub yet.

post.summary: Import resume from JSON Resume format
post.description: Creates import job and processes JSON Resume data (jsonresume.org standard)
Placeholder endpoint. Returns 503 until the LinkedIn v2 API client lands. Frontend should treat this as 'em breve' for now.
Validates and transforms JSON Resume to internal format without saving

post.summary: Import resume from a PDF file
post.description: Accepts a PDF upload (multipart/form-data, field name `file`), extracts the text with pdf-parse and structures it with the LLM. Creates a Resume row and marks it as primary when the user has none.

get.summary: List all resumes for a specific user
Get resumes shared with current user
Get remaining resume slots for current user
Global multi-type search (resumes, users, jobs, posts)
get.description: Returns results grouped by entity type. Each item carries `{id,title,snippet?,href,badge?}` so the frontend can render a generic list. Groups: `resumes`, `users`, `jobs`, `posts`.

get.summary: Find similar resumes by resume id

post.summary: Claim a shadow profile as the authenticated user. One-shot — cannot be undone.

get.summary: Find unclaimed shadow profiles matching an email and/or github login. Used by the signup flow.

post.summary: Admin: build or refresh a GitHub-based shadow profile. Call once per login; idempotent.
Create share link for a resume

get.summary: List slug aliases for a share

post.summary: Add a slug alias to a share

get.summary: Render a QR code PNG pointing to the share public URL
List share links for a resume

get.description: Single SSE channel. Subscribe with `?topics=user:UID,notifications:UID,...`. Server emits `EffectBatch` JSON payloads — the frontend dispatcher maps each `Effect` to a side-effect (invalidate query, toast, navigate, …).

get.summary: Published success stories for the landing carousel.
get.description: Success stories — public carousel + admin CRUD

post.description: Success stories — public carousel + admin CRUD

delete.description: Success stories — public carousel + admin CRUD

patch.description: Success stories — public carousel + admin CRUD

get.description: List of niches for the area
List of skills for the niche

get.summary: Get niches by tech area type

post.summary: Detect the language of a text

get.summary: Get public activities for a user
Get user activities filtered by type
List comments authored by a user
Get connection stats for a user
Get users followed by a user
List reactions given by a user
List a user’s skills with endorsement counts

post.summary: Endorse a user for a skill

get.summary: List endorsers for a specific skill
Get social stats for a user

delete.description: GDPR-compliant deletion that removes all user data.

post.summary: Accept Terms of Service or Privacy Policy
post.description: Records user acceptance of legal documents with IP and user agent for audit trail. Required before accessing protected API endpoints.

get.summary: Users sharing the most skills with you

get.description: Retrieves all consent records for the authenticated user
Returns which documents the user has accepted for the current versions

get.summary: Get network summary for authenticated user
List permission keys granted to the current user (for UI gating)
List the authenticated user’s own skills with endorsement counts
Get social stats for authenticated user
List users with a public username (paginated)
Check if a username is available

post.summary: Validate username (multi-error breakdown for client forms)
post.description: Returns every format/availability problem at once. Each error carries a stable `code` plus a `message` already localized via the request `Accept-Language` header.

get.summary: List webhooks registered by the current user.
List recent delivery attempts for a webhook.
